div1.entryFree: Ruth, pity: looking with pretty r. upon my pain, Sonn. 132, 4. a spectacle of r. Pilgr. 127. rue, even for r., here shortly shall be seen, R2 III, 4, 106. spur them to ruthful work, rein them from r. Troil. V, 3, 48. would the nobility lay aside their r. and let me use my sword, Cor. I, 1, 201.
